description: Extracts structured fields from a Reconciliation Action Plan (RAP) document. Field names MUST match src/lib/rap/extraction-schema.ts so the BDA pipeline (pipeline.bda.ts) maps them into the canonical model. inferenceType 'explicit' = copy as written; 'inferred' = classify/normalize. BDA returns confidence per field automatically. NOTE: verify nested-object/list support and the exact result-JSON shape against your account before relying on this blueprint.

pillarRaw.instruction: The pillar/theme heading this commitment sits under, in the document's own words (e.g. 'Opportunities', 'Economy').

pillarNormalized.instruction: Map pillarRaw to one of: relationships, respect, opportunities, governance, employment, community, environment, economy, education, other.

deliverable.instruction: The concrete deliverable or step that achieves the action (the 'how').

timeline.instruction: The due date, quarter, or year for the deliverable, as written (the 'when').

owner.instruction: The role/position/team accountable for the commitment (the 'who'). Leave empty if not stated.

metric.instruction: The target, KPI, or measurable figure, copied verbatim (e.g. '$100 million annually', '1.5%', '85 communities'). Do not compute.

commitmentType.instruction: Classify as one of: employment, procurement, cultural_learning, governance, relationships, anti_racism, education_training, community_investment, environmental, partnership, other.

label.instruction: A short name for a meaningful field that does not fit any defined property.

value.instruction: The value for that field, copied from the document.

start.instruction: Start of the period the RAP covers (ISO date or year).

end.instruction: End of the period the RAP covers (ISO date or year).

orgName.instruction: The full legal name of the organization that published this RAP.

sector.instruction: The organization's sector, one of: finance, mining, energy, consulting, retail, health, government, education, transport, telecom, forestry, construction, aerospace, agriculture, media, other.

jurisdiction.instruction: Country/jurisdiction context: AU, CA, or other.

rapTitle.instruction: The title of the RAP document (e.g. 'Pathways to Economic Prosperity').

publicationDate.instruction: The date the RAP was published, as an ISO date if determinable.

periodCovered.instruction: The start and end of the period the RAP covers.

frameworkRefs.instruction: Frameworks the RAP references; each item one of: undrip, trc_cta_92, ocap, pair, other.

governanceBody.instruction: The body that governs/sponsors the RAP (e.g. a RAP Working Group, advisory council, or board sponsor).

reviewCycle.instruction: How often the RAP is reviewed/reported (e.g. annual, biennial, 3-year).

rapType.instruction: Australian RAP maturity tier if stated: reflect, innovate, stretch, or elevate. Leave empty for Canadian RAPs.

pairLevel.instruction: CCIB PAIR accreditation level if stated: committed, bronze, silver, or gold.

endorsementStatus.instruction: Whether the RAP is endorsed (Australia only), e.g. 'RA-endorsed' vs 'draft'.

commitments.instruction: Every commitment in the RAP. Extract one entry per action/deliverable row.

extras.instruction: Meaningful fields present in the document that do not map to any property above. Do not force-fit; leave empty if none.
